# Approval Matrix

Who may approve an expense, by amount. Above each threshold, the next
authority must approve in addition to the ones below it.

- Up to $5,000: the requesting manager.
- $5,000 to $25,000: the department head.
- $25,000 to $100,000: the finance director (human approval required).
- Above $100,000: the CFO and an audit-committee note.
